FAQs

If your rental ends up taking longer than expected, your rate automatically updates and you'll pay the next best hourly or daily rate. You'll also pay for any additional days of reduced liability, if that's the option you originally chose.

You can also return the car before your rental's scheduled end, but you won't be refunded for unused time.

No. You can't modify a prepaid rate during a rental. If your rental ends up taking longer than expected, your rate automatically updates and you'll pay the next best hourly or daily rate.

Return the car in the city where your rental started. Check the app's map and avoid places you can't park.

Returning in another city? Check the intercity and international trips policy to see which cities and countries are supported for this vehicle.

Returning to an airport? Check the airport dropoff policy to see which airports are supported for this vehicle.

Your first 15 minutes of reservation time are free. After that, you'll pay to keep the car reserved. Cancel within the free time if you don't want the rental.

You can reserve a car for up to 24 hours. If you don't start the car within that time, the reservation will end and you'll be charged a reservation fee.

If you reserve multiple cars within 1 hour, the 15 minutes of free reservation time will be shared between all of them.

By default, fuel and parking costs are included in the package rate. Refuel the car for free with the fuel card/Bolt app. Only refuel at the partner stations indicated on the map during your drive.

For long-distance trips, you can choose whether to include or exclude all fuel and parking costs. If you exclude them, you'll need to return the car with the same fuel level as it had at pickup. You can't refuel with the fuel card/Bolt app.

During your drive, you can check the fuel amount in the app. If you return the car with less fuel than it had at pickup, you'll need to pay a €2/liter refuelling fee.

If you include fuel and parking in the rate, you can refuel the car for free with the fuel card/Bolt app. Only refuel at the partner stations indicated on the map during your drive.

If you exclude fuel and parking from the rate, you'll need to pay any fuel and parking costs yourself. You'll also need to return the car with the same fuel level as it had at pickup. You can't refuel with the fuel card/Bolt app. During your drive, you can check the fuel amount in the app. If you return the car with less fuel than it had at pickup, you'll need to pay a €2/liter refuelling fee.

By default, your liability for damages to others is limited to €750. Your liability for damages to the vehicle is limited to €750.

If you choose to pay for reduced liability, your liability for damages to others is limited to €0. Your liability for damages to the vehicle is limited to €0.

From accidents to breakdowns, customer support is here to help.

•••• 6821

15 min free, then rental starts

Fuel and parking

Always included for short drives

If included, you can refuel for free at any partner station via the Bolt app and park for free in allowed areas where Bolt Drive operates.

Best for short city drives

Exclude for 1+ day drives

If you choose to exclude, you must cover all fuel and parking costs yourself and cannot use the Bolt app/fuel card. You need to return the car with the same fuel level as it had at pickup.

Best for long distance drives

Read more about how it works in the FAQs

Extra time and distance

If your rental takes longer than expected, you'll be charged extra or your rate will update to the next-best hourly or daily rate.

You'll also pay for any additional days of reduced liability, if that's the option you originally chose.

You can return your rental before its scheduled end, but you won't be refunded for unused time.

Extra minute €0.17
Extra hour €7
Extra day (24 hours) €28
Extra distance €0.30/km
Extra reduced liability €9/day

Intercity and international trips

You can drop this car off in:

Starting city Free
Tallinn Free
Tartu + €9.99
Narva + €9.99
Pärnu + €9.99
Riga + €9.99

You can visit these countries:

🇪🇪 Estonia Free
🇱🇻 Latvia Free
🇱🇹 Lithuania Free
🇫🇮 Finland + €9.99/day

You may need to buy a vignette (toll sticker) to drive in some countries. Only drop off in the listed cities, and only drive to the listed countries. If you go off-list, you'll be fined.

FAQs

Airport dropoff

You can pay to start or end your rental at certain airports.

Berlin, BER
+ €8.00
Riga, RIX
+ €9.99 intercity fee
+ €8.00

If an airport's not on this list, you can't end a rental there. If you do, you'll be fined.

FAQs

Protection plan

You are always protected

By default, your liability for damages to the vehicle is limited to €750. Your liability for damages to others is limited to €750.

Pay €9/day for reduced liability

With this add-on, your liability for damages to the vehicle is limited to €0. Your liability for damages to others is limited to €0.

Recommended

Protection is subject to compliance with Bolt's Terms & Conditions. Report accidents or damage immediately to Bolt and the police.
